---
title: Gene regulatory networks in medulloblastoma
date: 2023-05-19
metadata-files: 
  - _metadata.yml
  - ../_quarto.yml
---

## Goal of this analysis

To infer active gene regulatory networks in medulloblastoma using pySCENIC.


## Files and directories

### Code

The CSV files from 2023-05-11 (counts, metadata, and UMAP embeddings) were used as input.

### Output

See `<pyscenic results directory>/20230519/` for the output files and figures. Briefly:

- `.adjacencies.csv` contains the list of TFs with their targets and the weight/importance of that connection
  - Columns: TF, target, importance
- `.auc_mtx.csv` contains the AUCell score for each regulon in each cell type
  - cells (rows) by regulons (columns)
- `.enr_motifs.csv` contains information about the TFs and the motif(s) associated with each of them
  - use `pyscenic.utils.load_motifs()` to load this file
- `.h5ad` contains an `anndata` object containing gene expression and other metadata
- `.qc_counts.csv` contains the filtered counts matrix
- `.regulons.dat` contains information about each regulon and its target genes
  - use `pickle.load()` to load this file
- `.rss.csv` contains the RSS for each regulon in each cluster
  - clusters (rows) by regulons (columns)


## Results

![UMAP with sample IDs, clusters, and subtypes from 2023-05-10.](/CBL_scRNAseq/results/tumour/Vladoiu/20230510/mnn/umap.png){#fig-mb-umap}

@fig-mb-umap shows the UMAP visualization of the tumour cells following fastMNN integration (see notes from 2023-05-10).

![Regulon specificity scores for the regulons of each MB cluster.](/CBL_scRNAseq/results/pyscenic/20230519/regulon_specificity_scores.png){#fig-rss}

@fig-rss shows the regulon specificity scores for each of the regulons in each MB cluster (@fig-mb-umap, middle).
